name: Ocean’s Heart
original_name: ทะเลเคียงใจ
overview: No matter how many storms the heart of Pathawee must endure, the Anda will always surround and protect it — with a promise to forever be the “sea” that stands by the “heart” of this “land.”

trailers.title: OFFICIAL PILOT I OCEAN'S HEART ทะเลเคียงใจ
